Recipe (Post Pac Man) just says "Ball Clay" with no grade specified. IMCO carries several distinct ball clays (C&C, OM4, Tennessee #1); picked OM4 (Old Mine #4) per Jake, 2026-07-04 -- a very commonly specified grade in published recipes. Flag if the source recipe meant a different grade.
25961 - Zinc Oxide (Zochem 800). Single generic product, no grade variants. Verified live 2026-07-04.

Custer Feldspar is discontinued -- confirmed via web search 2026-07-04 that it is no longer mined as of 2024. G-200 EU Potassium Feldspar (same SKU 703 already priced here as "Potash Feldspar") is the standard industry substitute, but multiple sources note it is NOT chemically identical (different origin, lower iron, higher purity) -- a recipe may need reformulation to hit original targets, not addressed by this cost analysis. Priced via the substitute since Custer cannot be purchased new at any price. Kept as its own material (not merged into Potash Feldspar) so recipes keep calling for what they actually specify.

25982 - Ultrox 500W (Zircopax); IMCO lists it under their own "Ultrox" brand name but the product title itself confirms it is the Zircopax-equivalent zirconium silicate opacifier. Verified live 2026-07-04.
